name: jetblue / Airlines workflow 94
goal_pattern: Book a flight + cruise for two flying from Atlanta in October for vacation starting on October 8 for 6 nights with Miami as the departure port, choose the cheapest flight, hotel, and room in the cruise for booking.

activation.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
